data.title: Bitcoin Faces Resistance as Traders Anticipate Further Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, Greek.live macro researcher Adam has released a report in the English community highlighting a bearish sentiment towards Bitcoin. Key traders identify the $82,000 to $84,000 range as a resistance level and expect further declines. There is a notable division regarding altcoins, with some traders seeing opportunities to short overvalued tokens, while others remain cautious about the timing of these trades due to potential market manipulation.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based KERNEL perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1 to 75 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched the U-based KERNEL perpetual contract with a leverage range of 1-75 times. Contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 85,000 USDT with a 0.80% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 14, 2025, 12:28 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 85,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 85,019.726563 USDT, with a narrowed 0.80% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Highlights the Importance of Values in Ethereum dApps
data.description:
TL;DR Vitalik Buterin calls on Ethereum dApp developers to embed strong social values—privacy, neutrality, and openness—into their platforms, emphasizing that the ethos behind apps is as crucial as their technical functionality. He highlights that around 80% of the Ethereum application layer should serve a purposeful role, illustrating that successful projects like privacy wallets and decentralized. .
source: https://crypto-economy.com/vitalik-buterin-highlights-the-importance-of-values-in-ethereum-dapps/

data.title: Former OpenAI chief scientist Ilya's new company Safe Superintelligence raises another $2 billion at a valuation of $32 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Former OpenAI chief scientist Ilya's new company Safe Superintelligence raised another $2 billion at a valuation of $32 billion, led by Greenoaks, but the company did not disclose much information publicly. Safe Superintelligence previously raised more than $1 billion in February this year, when the company was valued at $30 billion. (Techstartups)

data.title: Analysis: BTC faces ‘cloud resistance’ in $85K range, creating unfavorable risk-reward scenario for bullish traders
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CoinDesk co-executive editor Omkar Godbole wrote an analysis that Bitcoin faces "Cloud Resistance" in the $85,000 range, creating an unfavorable risk-reward scenario for bullish traders. Since Saturday, BTC has been challenging the lower limit of the Ichimoku, which is around $85,000. It is reported that the Ichimoku is a technical analysis indicator developed by a Japanese journalist in the 1960s that can provide a comprehensive insight into market momentum, support and resistance.
Bitcoin's near-term outlook may look constructive due to increased demand for bullish bets in the options market, but the cryptocurrency is close to key resistance levels that have limited upside in recent months, which means that the risk-reward situation is not very favorable for those who want to take advantage of the bullish outlook. Bitcoin currently faces strong resistance around $85,000, and support is significantly lower than $75,000. (CoinDesk)
